description: An authorization bypass vulnerability exists in Schneider Electric's Modicon M340, Modicon Premium, Modicon Quantum PLC, BMXNOR0200. Requests to CGI functions allow malicious users to bypass authorization.

product.name: Modicon M340, Modicon Premium, Modicon Quantum, BMXNOR0201

enisaIdProduct.product_version: All Modicon M340, Premium, Quantum PLCs and BMXNOR0201
